heading: Principal-agent relationship established
label: 2139 Principal-agent relationship established
text: When construing or enforcing the provisions of this chapter, the act, omission, or failure of any person acting for or employed by a research facility, a dealer, or an exhibitor or a person licensed as a dealer or an exhibitor pursuant to the second sentence of , or an operator of an auction sale subject to , or an intermediate handler, or a carrier, within the scope of his employment or office, shall be deemed the act, omission, or failure of such research facility, dealer, exhibitor, licensee, operator of an auction sale, intermediate handler, or carrier, as well as of such person.section 2133 of this titlesection 2142 of this title
notes: Amendments1976— inserted “or an intermediate handler, or a carrier,” after “,” and substituted “operator of an auction sale, intermediate handler, or carrier, as well as of such person.” for “or an operator of an auction sale as well as of such person.” after “research facility, dealer, exhibitor, licensee,”.Pub. L. 91–579section 2142 of this title
